---
title: "Brand Demo"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - brand
      - custom.scss
    toc: true
---

## Overview

This HTML document is styled using the `_brand.yml` file in this directory. It exists to exercise the HTML/Bootstrap control schema in the Theme Tweaker (headings, links, code, table of contents, and callouts).

Edit `$h2-font-size` in `custom.scss` to change the section heading size, or tweak any of the variables live from the panel.

## Typography and links

Body text with a [link](https://quarto.org) and some `inline code`. Adjust `$body-color`, `$link-color`, and `$font-size-root` to see these change.

## Code blocks

```r
# Tweak $code-block-bg, $code-block-border-left, and the copy-button colors
fit <- lm(dist ~ speed, data = cars)
summary(fit)
```

## Callouts

::: {.callout-note}
A note callout. Drive its accent with `$callout-color-note`.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
A warning callout, plus `$callout-border-width` and `$callout-icon-scale`.
:::

## Done

Re-render with `quarto render index.qmd`, or use the Theme Tweaker to adjust variables live and commit them back to `custom.scss`.
